{{Quote|We're an assault tank, not a boat!|A ''Canderous'' driver|<ref name="EAW" />}}
The '''''Canderous''-class assault tank''' was a heavy [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsor]] tank produced by [[MandalMotors/Legends|MandalMotors]] and used by the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]

==Description==
The ''Canderous''-class assault tank was produced by MandalMotors. It was named after famous [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Canderous Ordo]]. It was protected by armor that rivaled that of an [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|Imperial walker.]] It was armed with two heavy mass-driver cannons and a [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] battery. Despite its weight, it could move in various places inaccessible to walkers.<ref name="RECG" />

==History==
[[File:CanderousandF9-TZ.jpg|left|thumb|Two ''Canderous'' tanks protect a [[F9-TZ Transport]].]]
Tanks of this kind were expensive and only the very rich could afford to have them in their arsenal. The [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Tyber Zann]], head of the Zann Consortium, was known to have a number of ''Canderous''-class tanks as part of his military forces.

Due to these tanks being heavily armored, they were more than capable of handling punishment, which was why they were equipped with a [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] control mechanism that tricked enemy vehicles into targeting the tank while the weaker forces would, temporarily, be free from harm. The tank was also equipped with an energy shield to deflect blaster attacks; this, added to the tank's inherently formidable armor, made it a force to be reckoned with.

In [[44 ABY]], these tanks were first used by Mandalorian [[Commander/Legends|commander]] [[Belok Rhal]] in the [[Siege of the New Jedi Temple|siege]] on the [[New Jedi Temple|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and in the suppression of the [[Octusi]] [[Blaudu Sextus revolt|revolt]] on [[Blaudu Sextus]].
